prompt:

Direct flash lighting, Y2K film/digital camera style, bright glowing skin, sharp shadows, high contrast, deep red-orange tones, slight film grain, vintage retro mood. Dark background contrasting sharply against the subject. Close-up half-body to partial full-body shot, slight dynamic angle, 35mm or 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face, vivid colors, cinematic. Ultra realistic, 4K, film grain, glossy skin, sharp highlights, deep shadows. Aspect ratio 9:16 vertical.
Negative: anime, cartoon, 3D render, painting, bright studio lighting, plastic skin, unnatural hand position, distorted fingers, extra fingers, floating limbs
